title: outln.frombelowland
body:
PLEASE join our [discord](https://discord.gg/qQJ37ghxKM)!!! :(

*below the remnants of a broken server*
*you go in your own expedition*
*find us*
*and join your friends*

---

(also known as belowland)
BEFORE YOU START!! this mod takes around 3-4ish days to start doing events that are SCARY.
if you wish to make the mod "more aggressive", theres a list of commands you can do by doing /belowland.
# Description

Currently in alpha.

**outln.frombelowland** is a horror mod inspired mostly by *wonderland.jar*. It's intentionally slow-paced — roughly 3 in-game days pass before anything unsettling begins.

Multiplayer is supported, though not recommended.

*wonderland.jar* inspired me to make my own horror mod, and I loved the process so much that I went ahead and built one in my own style. I really hope you enjoy it — this is my first horror mod.

**Project started:** May 8th

---

## Requirements

- [GeckoLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)

---

## Features

<details>
<summary> !Spoilers! </summary>

1. Spooky imagery
2. Entities
3. Dimensions
4. New items
5. Events that occur in your world
6. Loud noises and songs
7. A campaign *(coming soon)*

</details>

---
